About

Built for launch, ready to grow

Kourani Market Ltd

We are building a practical local food supply business from Farnworth, focused on reliable stock, straightforward service and useful products for both businesses and local households.

Business customers Supply, sourcing, repeat ordering and practical support for kitchens and food businesses.
Local customers Frozen food, groceries, essentials and selected African, Caribbean and international products.
Service model Warehouse-based with click & collect and local delivery.
